memberdef.name: AGC_getset
AGCObjType
memberdef.initializer: = { PyVarObject_HEAD_INIT(NULL, 0) .tp_name = "agc.AGC", .tp_basicsize = sizeof(AGCObject), .tp_dealloc = (destructor)AGCObj_dealloc, .tp_flags = Py_TPFLAGS_DEFAULT, .tp_doc = "Create an AGC instance.\n", .tp_methods = AGCObj_methods, .tp_getset = AGC_getset, .tp_new = AGCObj_new, .tp_init = (initproc)AGCObj_init, }
